name: Dr. Dabber Ghost 2
summary: A compact concentrate pen with a ceramic vapour path and fixed low temperature, for patients prescribed wax or extracts who want simple, flavour-led dosing.
description: The Dr. Dabber Ghost 2 is a concentrates-only pen built for flavour rather than big clouds. A glazed ceramic vapour path and titanium heating element run at a single optimised low temperature, which protects terpenes and keeps draws smooth instead of harsh. Operation is one button: load a small amount, activate, inhale. USB-C fast charging with pass-through means you can keep using it while it tops up. For a UK patient prescribed concentrates who wants something pocket-sized and fuss-free, this is an easy choice — though the fixed temperature means no dosing control, and it does nothing for dry herb.

specs.label: Heating
specs.value: Titanium coil with ceramic vapour path
